summary: Iteration 46: Verified Planning Week View complete rewrite. All 10 features tested and working correctly - time grid with 15-minute slots (08:00-20:00), day columns (LUN-SAB), today highlight (GIO 2), appointments positioned by time, appointments show time/client/services, draggable appointments, click opens Edit dialog, + button opens New Appointment dialog with date pre-filled, operator legend at bottom, and color-coded appointments by operator.
passed_tests: === LOGIN FLOW ===
1. Login page loads with Accedi/Registrati tabs - PASS
2. Login with admin@brunomelito.it / mbhs637104 - PASS
3. Redirects to Planning page after login - PASS
=== PLANNING WEEK VIEW ===
4. 'Settimana' button switches to week view - PASS
5. Time grid shows 15-minute slots (08:00-20:00) - PASS
- 08:00 visible: True
- 12:00 visible: True
- 16:00 visible: True
- 20:00 visible: True
6. Day columns show LUN-SAB with date numbers - PASS
- Days found: LUN, MAR, MER, GIO, VEN, SAB
- Week shows: LUN 30, MAR 31, MER 1, GIO 2, VEN 3, SAB 4
7. Today (GIO 2) is visually highlighted with pink/rose background - PASS
8. Appointments are positioned by time (absolute positioned cards) - PASS
- 12 appointment cards found in week view
- Appointments on MER 1: 08:00, 10:00
9. Appointments show time, client name, and services - PASS
- Example: '08:00 TEST_Upselling_6762'
- Longer appointments show services in card
10. Appointments are draggable (draggable=true attribute) - PASS
- First appointment draggable attribute: 'true'
- Has cursor-grab class for visual feedback
11. Clicking appointment opens Edit Appointment dialog - PASS
- Dialog title: 'Modifica Appuntamento'
- Shows client info, services, operator, date, time
12. + button per day column opens New Appointment dialog - PASS
- 6 add buttons found (one per day)
- Dialog title: 'Nuovo Appuntamento'
- Date pre-filled with clicked day's date (e.g., 2026-03-30)
13. Operator legend shown at bottom of week view - PASS
- Legend text: 'OPERATORI: BRUNO MBHS'
- Status legend: 'Da fare, Completato, Festivo, Bloccato'
14. Appointment cards are color-coded by operator - PASS
- Blue cards (rgb(59, 130, 246)) for BRUNO operator
- Pink cards for other appointments
critical_code_review_comments: WeekView.jsx: TIME_SLOTS array correctly generates 15-minute intervals from 08:00-20:00 (49 slots)
WeekView.jsx: getStyle() function correctly calculates appointment position using (h-8)*4 + floor(m/15) formula
WeekView.jsx: getOperatorColor() returns operator color from operators array, with fallback to status colors
WeekView.jsx: handleDragStart/handleDragEnd/handleDrop implement HTML5 native drag & drop
WeekView.jsx: Operator legend renders at bottom with colored dots and operator names
PlanningPage.jsx: handleWeekDragDrop() calls PUT /api/appointments/{id} with new date and time
PlanningPage.jsx: Passes operators, blockedSlotsMap, onEditAppointment, onDragDrop props to WeekView
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: TEST_Upselling appointments on LUN 30 and MER 1
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified the complete rewrite of WeekView.jsx component. All features working: time grid with 15-minute slots, day columns (Mon-Sat), today highlight, appointments positioned by time, draggable appointments, click opens Edit dialog, + button opens New Appointment dialog with date pre-filled, operator legend at bottom, and color-coded appointments. The week view shows Mon 30 Mar - Sat 4 Apr 2026. Today is Thursday April 2, 2026.

time_grid_15min_slots.details: TIME_SLOTS array generates 49 slots from 08:00-20:00 in 15-minute intervals

day_columns.details: 6 day columns: LUN 30, MAR 31, MER 1, GIO 2, VEN 3, SAB 4

appointment_positioning.details: Appointments absolutely positioned using getStyle() with top/height based on time

appointment_content.details: Cards show time, client name, and services (for taller cards)

draggable_appointments.details: draggable='true' attribute set, cursor-grab class for visual feedback

new_appointment_dialog.details: + button opens 'Nuovo Appuntamento' dialog with date pre-filled

operator_legend.details: Legend at bottom shows 'OPERATORI: BRUNO MBHS' with colored dots

color_coding.details: Appointments color-coded by operator (blue for BRUNO, pink for others)
